description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a sleek, minimalist design, upholstered in a dark charcoal fabric. The sofa features three large seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be loose and uniform in size. Two decorative throw pillows in green and one in a patterned gray and white fabric add visual interest and contrast to the otherwise monochromatic palette. The armrests are straight, low-profile, and padded, matching the overall clean lines of the sofa. The sofa is supported by slim, black metal legs positioned at the corners, giving it a slightly elevated and airy appearance. The upholstery is smooth and matte, with no visible tufting or decorative stitching, emphasizing a contemporary aesthetic suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern L-shaped sectional sofa in dark charcoal fabric with slim black metal legs, loose cushions, and decorative throw pillows. The design is minimalist and contemporary, featuring straight padded armrests and a smooth matte finish.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the L-shaped configuration, three seat and back cushions, and all three decorative pillows.
description_view_1: Front-right angle highlighting the sofa's depth, the arrangement of cushions, and the straight armrest on the right side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the slim black legs, with one patterned pillow visible.
description_view_3: Back-left perspective emphasizing the sofa's length, the straight backrest, and the left armrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose seat cushions and three matching loose back cushions, all uniform in size, with three decorative throw pillows placed at the corners and along the backrest.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, low-profile armrests at both ends, padded and matching the sofa's upholstery, with a clean, rectangular profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Six slim, black metal legs positioned at the corners and midpoints for support, with a straight, cylindrical style and exposed finish.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest at a medium height, segmented by three loose back cushions, with no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark charcoal fabric with a smooth, matte texture; no visible patterns or decorative stitching on the main upholstery, but throw pillows include geometric and solid patterns.
